feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Magical Experiment
entry.summary:
Author: twobraincellscombined

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,449Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 127

Summary: Arthur asks Merlin to learn magic to see if it can be trusted in defeating Morgana.   "We want to ask someone to learn magic to see if it can be used without corrupting the soul of the person who uses it. Lancelot suggested you be the person we ask." Merlin's lips parted a fraction, "He did?" "Indeed. Something about your heart being pure." Arthur brushed the compliment off with a wave of his hand and straightened in his seat, "I know you're scared of magic so you don’t have to do this if you don’t want to but-" "I'll do it."

entry.title: How Fatherhood Changes a Man (and Certain Policies of State)
entry.summary:
Author: mayoInYourWalls

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,273Chapters: 6/20Kudos: 19

Summary: Most everyone Merlin knew warned him that nothing good would ever come of his little (though astonishingly requited) crush on the Lady Morgana. Merlin was, as of now, finding himself in agreement, as she made her dramatic return to Camelot one year after Merlin had attempted to kill her with hemlock. But when Merlin discovers the child, his child, he can say at least one very good thing, as well many more exceedingly ridiculous and complicated things, certainly had come of it.

entry.title: An Oracle Of Roses
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 57,876Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 591

Summary: Arthur Pendragon, Prince Regent of the Albion Empire, always feared he would face an arranged marriage. Now, as he desperately struggles to restore magic in the hopes of saving his sister, the answer is obvious. He must marry Lord Emrys, the scion of a noble, magical line. Both men know their duty. Their union would bring all Albion back into balance, but the world is not a simple place, and neither of them make a good first impression. Will they be able to overcome their doubts, or is their match doomed to fail?

entry.title: The Parallel Palace
entry.summary:
Author: PaperInfinity

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,577Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 4

Summary: After stumbling across a strange stone on a hunting trip, Merlin and Arthur find themselves trapped in an inverted Camelot: a world where a Druid named Emrys is the king, and he happens to look just like Merlin. This other Merlin—charismatic, powerful and terrifying—has a strange fascination with Arthur, and Arthur appears to be falling under his spell. The real Merlin is without his magic, growing increasingly defenseless as this parallel world takes its toll. But nothing here is as it seems; and if Merlin and Arthur can't be honest with each other, they may not make it home alive. OR: Merlin and Arthur's devotion to each other exists across infinite worlds, and it always ends in tragedy. This version will be different.

entry.title: karen rescues a king in central park
entry.summary:
Author: JustAnotherRogueSelkie

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,227Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 11

Summary: Claire answered the phone grumpily, as she always did. Most of the time, the grumpiness was warranted. “Whaddya want?” she asked. “There’s this guy, sounds German or something but google translate isn’t picking up the language. Pretty sure he said the word Arthur though. And... Myrddin. And Camelot. Context clues, I think he’s claiming to be King Arthur.” “Karen, I swear, if you are prank calling me.” “I’m not. He’s this hunky blond dude, not as hunky as your Luke though, got a sword and everything. Wearing armor. I found him passed out by the Central Park reservoir. He’s kinda injured. No ID or anything.” “I’m coming over. You owe me. Again. Where are you?” “I brought him to the office. Seemed the best thing to do, in the circumstances.”

entry.summary:
Author: remuscariad

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,061Chapters: 5/30Kudos: 383

Summary: Months before Arthur becomes crown prince, an assassination attempt is made on Uther’s life, and he is left with no choice but to ascend the throne.It changes nothing. It changes everything.ORBBC Merlin re-written. Season 1 king Arthur and onto the other seasons.

entry.title: Forbidden
entry.summary:
Author: Ahgase2002

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,718Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 86

Summary: "Your manservant is quite devoted" Mithian observed, following his gaze. Arthur snapped his attention back to her. "Merlin? He's adequate. When he's not being impossibly clumsy or insolent." "Strange. I've heard others speak of him with great admiration. They say he's fiercely loyal, I even heard that he's saved your life on multiple occasions." "He exaggerates his own importance." Mithian tilted her head, studying him. "You watch him quite frequently." Prince Arthur is in love with his manservant.

entry.title: The Anchor
entry.summary:
Author: jesstheemess

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,894Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 14

Summary: Merlin has spent hundreds of years, being lost at sea in his mind, and with his magic. He’s forgotten most of what he used to know, including Arthur’s face. He’d given up on hope that he’d ever return. But one night, after returning to his estate, having spent years away from the lake, a knock came at his door. His Once and Future King, risen again. But first, he must teach Arthur the modern world and uncover the true reason he’s been brought back from the dead. Not to save the world, but to save Merlin.

entry.title: from this mountain, i can see so far
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,008Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 6

Summary: The dragon’s eyes gleamed. “Your thoughts burn very loudly.” “Oh, brilliant,” Merlin muttered. “That’s exactly what I wanted to hear.” Kilgharrah watched him with the patient stillness of something that had seen centuries rise and fall. Then, thoughtfully: “You burn in three directions now.”

entry.title: Once and Future Mikaelson
entry.summary:
Author: arcaneroa

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,138Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 7

Summary: What if Merlin's loneliness changed everything? One frustrated spell didn't just give him a second chance; it rebirthed him in New Orleans as the only son of Klaus and Hayley Mikaelson. When Arthur returns, the same young king Merlin once knew, finds a world full of magic, monsters, and surprises... and a Merlin who's grown in ways he never imagined.

entry.title: Lessons in pleasure
entry.summary:
Author: Ace_Teagirl

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 62,456Chapters: 15/15Kudos: 219

Summary: “One of my girls mentioned she saw a new face at the market today. A pretty boy looking for employment. I have a proposition for you, if you want to accompany me inside,” the woman said. Her voice was warm and her smile almost motherly. It made Merlin ache for the comfort of his home. He looked at her uncertainly. Merlin may have had a sheltered upbringing in his small farming village, but he could imagine what kind of work she had to offer him, and he wasn’t sure he wanted it. Still, he stood up, shaking slightly from hunger and exhaustion. There was something in this woman’s eyes that compelled Merlin to trust her.

entry.title: i knew you'd come back to me
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,348Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 6

Summary: Aithusa launched forward immediately, meeting her halfway. She dipped her head, nudging the neckerchief forward, ready to fulfil Merlin’s command. Freya exhaled as she took it. Her gaze found Arthur’s for a moment, lips curving into a soft smile. Arthur returned it helplessly. They realized the existence of the letter at the same time, bundled in the cloth. Merlin almost never wrote. Not to her.

entry.title: To the god at my feet, I offer sanctuary
entry.summary:
Author: TimesOnlyReason

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,695Chapters: 10/18Kudos: 84

Summary: In a flash of motion the blade of Excalibur rests against the hollow of Merlin's neck. ‘You are not fighting back,’ Arthur breathes with the shock and disgust a man can only feel when expecting pain and not receiving it, ‘is it out of trust, or do you truly not care if you die?’ ‘If it is by your hand, I would make no attempt to stop it’ Merlin replies, breathing just as heavy, a small shake of his head and scrunch of his brow - as if the answer were obvious. If this was what the king wanted - if this was how a destiny ends - for once in his life Merlin would comply with the order freely. -------During a bandit attack Arthur discovers Merlin's magic.How will this change them? Or have they already changed too much for it to matter? Can you truly hide who you are, or are you doomed to be known? CURRENT UPDATE SCHEDULE - 2 chapters on Tuesdays and Saturdays (4 chapters a week)

entry.title: A Legend that Begins With a Crush
entry.summary:
Author: Clearwater96

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,891,416Chapters: 122/?Kudos: 1,598

Summary: Arthur Pendragon and Merlin were literally from two different worlds. One is a prince from a great kingdom and the other a common farm boy from the next kingdom over. These two should have never met.But that was before they realized their parents were once friends and arranged the two of them to marry when they reached adulthood. That was before Uther turned on magic and Hunith went on the run with her infant son.Now, twenty years have passed and the Prince, Arthur Pendragon is far out of his depth. After four months of marriage and learning what he has about Merlin, he knows that things need to change, but doesn’t know what can be done.And with every attempt at trying going wrong, with mysterious boys showing up wanting to be a knight, strange physician’s trying to coerce his consort away, even stranger ladies who’ve seen to weaken Arthur’s brain, and the arrival of an odd Druid boy they need to risk it all just to get to safety…will Arthur ever get things to go right?

entry.title: Scales and Ice
entry.summary:
Author: NotoriousJYT

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,107Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 6

Summary: This is the Merlin/Heated Rivalry crossover no one asked for but I decided to write any way. Shane, Ilya, and Svetlana unexpectedly find themselves in Camelot. Will they find their way home? Do they decide to stay? And what does Morgana think about all of this?

entry.title: helpless alone
entry.summary:
Author: hithereitslou

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,196Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 30

Summary: Arthur sends Merlin on a vacation to show that he doesn’t really need him, only to be proven gravely wrong.

entry.title: Within Four Walls
entry.summary:
Author: Oakfiddle

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,314Chapters: 1/9Kudos: 5

Summary: Merlin and his mum wans to move away from Ealdor to get a fresh start, to leave his mum's abusive ex-boyfriend behind.They go to Camelot to look at a flat. His mum falls in love with the flat, and Merlin falls in love with the property manager, who also happens be the landlord's son.Why can't life be simple for once?
